items.title: [Steam论坛] Уже несколько дней игра не обновляется.
items.summary: На протяжении нескольких дней я наблюдаю, что при запуске игры у меня происходит... ничего. Обычная, бело-чёрно-серая заставка Морименс с вечным переходом от города к детективу из второй части (Музей восковых фигур), который вечно перемещается от каких то изучений, сборов информац...
items.author: Agirasa

items.title: [Steam论坛] Interface is Overwhelming
items.summary:
I love Saya no Uta, so I decided to give this game a try, but let me say.

I haven't seen an interface 1/10 this convoluted and confusing in my life. Dwarf Fortress is simple and straightforward compared to this!

How many currencies does this thing have? How many sidequests (I assume that's what they are; don't really know) available from the very beginning, with no context?

I don't know what order I should play things, for a balanced and challenging experience. Should I click on the Saya thin
items.author: ScorpionWasp

items.title: [Steam论坛] Cards dont pop out on hover
items.summary: This is the first time I've seen a game like this where part of the card is hidden off screen while in your hand and the card doesn't pop out so that you can read it when you hover over it.  It's pretty annoying grabbing the card and pulling it out to read it, then carefully placing it back in hand so that I don't accidentally play it.  I wonder if I'm doing something wrong or they really just haven't implemented this basic and standard feature to their game....
items.author: Ruckkus
